crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest-priority BD task (inbound lead response, prospect research, discovery follow-up, the configured follow-up cadence on open prospects, or qualified-opportunity handoff).

crons.name: followup-sweep
crons.prompt: Read and follow .claude/skills/nepq/nepq-followup-cadence/SKILL.md. Sweep every open prospect, fire any follow-up due today on the configured cadence (draft for approval unless auto-send is enabled), and recover no-shows / no-responses. Report pipeline movement to the owner.
